CyberSprint 2026

Welcome to CyberSprint 2026 - A comprehensive cyber security workshop and CTF event. Choose your portal below to get started.

Student Registration

Register for the CyberSprint 2026 event. Fill in your details and get your QR pass.

Teacher Portal

Access the teacher dashboard to manage students and track attendance.

Admin Panel

Administrative access for event management and system configuration.
